faq.title: Questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: Booking catering shouldn't take three days, five WhatsApps, and ten Instagram DMs. We built Catery to give event planners the clarity they need — and caterers the visibility they deserve.

items.q: Is it free to join Catery?
items.a: Yes, downloading and using the Catery app is completely free for customers.
You can set up your event search and start browsing in under 2 minutes.

items.q: What types of businesses can join?
items.a: All types of catering businesses — from small home kitchens to large catering companies.
We currently operate across major Egyptian cities and are expanding rapidly.
Customers search by date, location, and cuisine type. Your profile appears in results.
Download the app from the App Store or Google Play and create your free account.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Caterer?
cta.subtitle: Browse, compare, and book — all from one free app.
